nasb.text: Upon the wicked He will rain snares; Fire and brimstone and burning wind will be the portion of their cup.

esv.text: Let him rain coals on the wicked; fire and sulfur and a scorching wind shall be the portion of their cup.

cnv.text: 耶和華必使火炭落在惡人身上， 烈火、硫磺和旱風是他們杯中的分。

ccb.text: 祂要把烈焰熊熊的火炭和硫磺降在恶人身上， 用炙热的风惩罚他们。

csbs.text: 他必向恶人密布网罗， 火、硫磺、灼热的风是他们杯中的份。
